app.title: Recall Touch — AI Phone Calls, Handled

dashboard.subtitle: Your AI-powered revenue operator at a glance.

welcome.title: Welcome to Recall Touch
welcome.body: We’ll keep this space warm until your first calls start coming in.

needsAttention.title: Needs attention
needsAttention.empty: You're all caught up. We'll surface anything that needs your attention here.

activity.title: Recent activity

loadError.message: We couldn't load activity. Check your connection and try again.

agentReady.title: Your AI agent is ready
agentReady.description: Connect your phone number to start receiving real calls.
agentReady.footnote: Businesses like yours recover $2,400+/month in missed calls.

connectPhone.title: Connect your phone
connectPhone.body: Route your existing number or claim a new one so your AI can start answering real calls.

testCall.title: Make a test call
testCall.body: Hear the current greeting and confirm your call flow before going live.

shareTeam.title: Share with your team
shareTeam.body: Invite the people who should see leads, appointments, and inbox updates.

seeLive.title: See it handled live
seeLive.description: Watch the sample call walkthrough to hear how a real lead is answered, qualified, and booked before you connect your line.

roi.title: Estimated ROI
roi.body: Businesses at your stage typically recover $2,400+ a month once every missed call turns into a captured lead.

systemEvents.title: Recent system events
systemEvents.empty: Your setup events will appear here.

dashboard.heroHeading: Welcome to your Recall Touch dashboard
dashboard.heroDescription: Your AI phone system is almost ready. Connect a number and make your first test call to see calls start appearing here automatically.
dashboard.summaryBooked: Appointment locked in from this call.
dashboard.summaryLead: Lead captured and waiting for follow-up.
dashboard.readyForVolumeDesc: Upgrade your plan to increase included minutes and unlock higher outbound capacity as calls ramp up.
dashboard.noCallsWarning: No calls in the last 3+ days. Is your number forwarded?
dashboard.setupProgress: You're {pct}% of the way to a fully running AI phone line.
dashboard.testCallCta: Want to see your AI in action?
dashboard.testCallDesc: Use the Test tab on Agents to place a real voice call with your configured agent.
dashboard.eventsPlaceholder: Your setup events will appear here.

analytics.title: Analytics

periodSummary.title: Period summary
periodSummary.empty: Not enough data yet to generate a summary.

analytics.description: See how conversations turn into kept appointments and real revenue.
analytics.emptyHeading: Analytics populate as calls come in
analytics.emptyDescription: Your first chart will appear after your first call.
analytics.glanceSummary: Handled {totalCalls} calls, created {leads} leads, booked {appointments} appointments, and protected an estimated ${revenue} in revenue.
analytics.glanceEmpty: Once calls start coming in, you'll see a summary of how many became leads, appointments, and revenue.
analytics.insightBusyHour: Busiest hour this week stays stable around mid-morning.
analytics.insightAvailability: Questions about availability often appear outside standard hours.
analytics.insightLiveAnswer: Calls that reach a live answer are much more likely to become appointments.
analytics.insightPricing: Make sure pricing and availability are easy to confirm in the first 30 seconds.

analytics.periodNoData: No calls recorded in the selected {period} period. Make a test call to start seeing insights here.

hero.title: Your phone calls. Handled.
hero.subtitle: AI agents that answer, qualify, and book — so you never miss a call again
hero.trustLine: Works with your existing number · No contracts · 14-day free trial

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Simple, transparent plans that scale with your revenue.

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: For solo operators who want AI to answer every call.

growth.name: Growth
growth.description: For growing teams that need reliable coverage and follow-up.

scale.name: Scale
scale.description: For teams that run on scheduled revenue and complex pipelines.

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.description: For organizations that need custom routing, security, and SLAs.

faq.title: Pricing questions
faq.trial: Do you offer a free trial?
faq.trialAnswer: Yes — all non-Enterprise plans include a 14-day free trial.
faq.overage: What happens if I go over my minutes?
faq.overageAnswer: We simply bill overage at your plan’s per-minute rate with no penalties.
faq.cancelAnswer: Yes — you can cancel or change plans at any time from the billing settings.

business.heading: Tell us about your business
business.description: We use this to personalize how your AI answers the phone and introduces your company.

agent.heading: Configure your first AI agent
agent.description: Choose a template and customize how your agent talks, handles callers, and books appointments.

knowledge.heading: Add knowledge
knowledge.description: Give your agent the context it needs: FAQs, services, pricing, location, and more.

phone.heading: Connect your phone
phone.description: Provision a new number or connect an existing one so callers can reach your AI.

test.heading: Make your first test call
test.description: Call your own AI and see how it handles real conversations before going live.

complete.heading: You’re ready to go live
complete.description: Your AI is configured, connected, and ready to answer calls for your business.

toast.complete: Onboarding complete. Redirecting to your dashboard.
